{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032114102072B2792402BB407ADADF"}"},"total":3754},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7207354666865738554","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"2023.3.6
从阴间神探到猎罪神探，看完了之后想说的真的太多太多，感谢宋阳黄小桃王大力孙冰心王援朝宋星辰丁隐宋听雪迟娇子慕容清烟钟子柒姜含玉及大家的陪伴，让我见证了一个又一个感动的故事，也见到了对战江北残刀时大家的英勇无畏和战士般的意志。每一个人物的牺牲都特别戳泪点，每一次的伏笔都会让我兴致勃勃的想看下去，真的很喜欢书里的每一个人。
如果可以的话希望再续写一部吧，把埋下的一些坑填的再完整一点，真的是一部很好很好的作品！","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":10,"text":"阴间神探","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%98%B4%E9%97%B4%E7%A5%9E%E6%8E%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774073420407ADADF%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227207354666865738554%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226993278876528937997%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%98%B4%E9%97%B4%E7%A5%9E%E6%8E%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1678093158,"group_id":"6993278876528937997","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"自由随性就好","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzitJBTVmFSSam3ZajLEzjA=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/e30606fe356f4b39a81964832096759f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776619551&x-signature=JEjsinVrMXQKRROofkXby6lQ4DE%3D","user_id":"88790907211","user_name":"绿色小猫o"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"88790907211","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6993278876528937997","book_info":{"abstract":"你听过最恐怖的案子是什么？
